description: Developer Platform (packages/developer-platform) + Admin & Operations (packages/admin) + Mobile Features integration - Three packages. Developer Platform: API key/OAuth app registration, webhook system, GraphQL schema, REST versioning, SDK generator, docs generator, API playground, rate limit tiers, usage analytics, marketplace, plugin sandboxing, extension points. Admin: super admin dashboard, user management, content moderation, system health, feature flags, config management, incident management, deployment management, migrations, job monitoring, alert rules, audit viewer, revenue dashboard, support tickets. Mobile: push notification routing, biometric auth, camera integration, contacts sync, location services, background tasks, badges, share extensions, widgets, offline sync, haptics, gestures, state persistence.
steps: Create packages/developer-platform/src/types.ts with interfaces: DeveloperApp, OAuthAppConfig, WebhookEndpoint, WebhookEvent, WebhookDelivery, GraphQLSchema, GraphQLField, GraphQLType, RESTVersion, SDKConfig, SDKTemplate, DocSection, APIPlaygroundRequest, RateTier, UsageRecord, MarketplaceApp, PluginManifest, PluginPermission, ExtensionPoint (200+ lines)

Create packages/developer-platform/src/core/app-registry.ts - AppRegistry class with app registration, OAuth client ID/secret generation, redirect URI management, scope definitions, app review workflow (250+ lines)

Create packages/developer-platform/src/core/webhook-system.ts - WebhookSystem class with endpoint registration, event delivery, retry with exponential backoff (1s, 2s, 4s, 8s, 16s), signature verification (HMAC), delivery logging, dead endpoint detection (350+ lines)

Create packages/developer-platform/src/core/graphql-schema.ts - GraphQLSchemaBuilder class with type definitions, query/mutation/subscription builders, resolver mapping, input validation, depth limiting, complexity analysis (300+ lines)

Create packages/developer-platform/src/core/rest-versioning.ts - RESTVersionManager class with URL-based versioning (/v1/, /v2/), header-based versioning, deprecation warnings, migration guides, backward compatibility checks (250+ lines)

Create packages/developer-platform/src/core/sdk-generator.ts - SDKGenerator class with TypeScript/Python/Go client generation from API spec, method generation, type generation, authentication helper, pagination helper (300+ lines)

Create packages/developer-platform/src/core/docs-generator.ts - DocsGenerator class with OpenAPI spec generation, markdown rendering, code examples, interactive examples, changelog generation (250+ lines)

Create packages/developer-platform/src/core/api-playground.ts - APIPlayground class with request builder, auth token management, response viewer, history, saved requests, environment variables (250+ lines)
Create packages/developer-platform/src/core/marketplace.ts - Marketplace class with app listing, review system, installation tracking, revenue sharing, category management, featured apps (250+ lines)

Create packages/developer-platform/src/core/plugin-sandbox.ts - PluginSandbox class with permission system (read, write, network, storage), capability checking, resource limits, execution isolation simulation, API surface restriction (300+ lines)
Create packages/developer-platform/src/index.ts barrel export for all 9 modules

Create packages/admin/src/types.ts with interfaces: AdminUser, UserSearchQuery, ModerationItem, ModerationAction, SystemHealth, ServiceStatus, FeatureFlag, FlagRule, FlagTarget, ConfigEntry, Incident, IncidentSeverity, Deployment, DeploymentStrategy, Migration, BackgroundJob, AlertRule, AlertCondition, AuditEntry, RevenueMetrics, SupportTicket, TicketStatus (200+ lines)

Create packages/admin/src/core/user-management.ts - UserManagement class with search (fuzzy, filters), view profile, edit fields, ban/unban, verify, role assignment, impersonation, activity log (300+ lines)

Create packages/admin/src/core/content-moderation.ts - ContentModerationQueue class with queue management, priority scoring, AI-assisted classification, bulk actions, appeal handling, policy enforcement, moderator assignment (300+ lines)

Create packages/admin/src/core/system-health.ts - SystemHealthMonitor class with service discovery, uptime tracking, error rate calculation, latency percentiles, dependency graph, degradation detection, status page generation (300+ lines)

Create packages/admin/src/core/feature-flags.ts - FeatureFlagService class with flag CRUD, percentage rollout, user targeting (segments, IDs), A/B variant assignment, kill switch, flag dependencies, audit trail (350+ lines)

Create packages/admin/src/core/config-manager.ts - ConfigManager class with live config updates, validation, rollback, diff tracking, environment override, secret management, config versioning (250+ lines)

Create packages/admin/src/core/incident-manager.ts - IncidentManager class with declare/acknowledge/resolve/postmortem workflow, severity levels, escalation rules, communication templates, timeline tracking (300+ lines)

Create packages/admin/src/core/deployment-manager.ts - DeploymentManager class with blue-green deployment, canary (1%, 5%, 25%, 50%, 100%), rollback, health gate, traffic shifting, deployment history (300+ lines)
Create packages/admin/src/core/migration-runner.ts - MigrationRunner class with up/down migrations, version tracking, dry run, batch execution, rollback to version, conflict detection (250+ lines)
Create packages/admin/src/core/job-monitor.ts - JobMonitor class with job registry, execution tracking, failure alerting, retry management, queue depth monitoring, worker health (250+ lines)

Create packages/admin/src/core/alert-engine.ts - AlertEngine class with threshold rules, anomaly detection (z-score), rate-of-change alerts, composite conditions, notification routing, silence/snooze (300+ lines)

Create packages/admin/src/core/support-system.ts - SupportSystem class with ticket creation, assignment, SLA tracking, priority escalation, canned responses, satisfaction survey, knowledge base (250+ lines)
Create packages/admin/src/index.ts barrel export for all 10 modules

Create packages/mobile/src/types.ts with interfaces: PushNotification, DeepLink, BiometricConfig, BiometricResult, CameraConfig, CaptureResult, ContactInfo, LocationData, Geofence, BackgroundTask, BadgeConfig, ShareContent, WidgetData, OfflineSyncItem, HapticPattern, GestureConfig, AppState (200+ lines)

Create packages/mobile/src/core/push-notifications.ts - PushNotificationManager class with token registration per device, deep link routing per app, notification channels, priority handling, silent push, rich notifications (300+ lines)

Create packages/mobile/src/core/biometric-auth.ts - BiometricAuth class with fingerprint/face ID abstraction, fallback to PIN, enrollment detection, secure enclave simulation, attestation (250+ lines)
Create packages/mobile/src/core/camera-service.ts - CameraService class with photo capture, video recording, QR/barcode scanning, AR overlay simulation, filters, gallery access (250+ lines)

Create packages/mobile/src/core/location-service.ts - LocationService class with GPS tracking, geofencing (enter/exit/dwell), reverse geocoding simulation, background location, battery optimization (250+ lines)

Create packages/mobile/src/core/offline-sync.ts - OfflineSyncManager class with operation queue, conflict resolution (last-write-wins, merge, manual), sync state machine, delta sync, bandwidth-aware sync (300+ lines)

Create packages/mobile/src/core/gesture-handler.ts - GestureHandler class with swipe (4 directions), pinch-to-zoom, long press, double tap, pan, rotation, velocity tracking, gesture composition (250+ lines)

Create packages/mobile/src/core/app-lifecycle.ts - AppLifecycle class with state persistence, restoration, background/foreground transitions, memory warnings, task scheduling, widget data providers (250+ lines)
Create packages/mobile/src/index.ts barrel export for all 7 modules
acceptance_criteria: Webhook system implements actual exponential backoff retry logic
Feature flags implement percentage-based rollout with deterministic hashing
Deployment manager implements canary traffic percentage progression
Offline sync implements conflict resolution strategies
Running node scripts/test.js passes with all three new packages detected
verification: find packages/developer-platform -name '*.ts' | wc -l should show 11 files
find packages/admin -name '*.ts' | wc -l should show 12 files
find packages/mobile -name '*.ts' | wc -l should show 9 files
